history.title: Who is the oldest living movie star?
history.description: "Jpromeo 7 Contributions Who is the oldest living movie star? As of August 20th 2017, Mary Carlisle . Born February 04th 1914 , she made her debut in the 1923silent film, Long Live the King with Jackie Coogan. Who is the oldest actor to act in a movie? The oldest actor to be in a move is Eli Wallach
